title: Squirrel Removal in Uniondale, NY | $900–$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal in Uniondale, Long Island. Humane trapping, exclusion & damage repair. Serving Uniondale homes & businesses. Call for fast service!
intro: Squirrels causing problems in your Uniondale attic or walls? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Uniondale and surrounding Long Island communities. Our licensed technicians use humane trapping methods and permanent exclusion solutions to protect your property from squirrel damage.
whyUs: With years of experience serving Uniondale homeowners and businesses, we understand the unique challenges Long Island properties face with squirrel infestations. Our team provides fast response times, transparent pricing between $900–$2,500, and guaranteed results to keep squirrels out for good.
localContext: Uniondale's mix of residential neighborhoods near Hofstra University, commercial properties along Hempstead Turnpike, and mature trees throughout the area create ideal conditions for squirrel activity. From single-family homes to multi-unit buildings near Nassau Coliseum, we've helped countless Uniondale properties resolve squirrel problems effectively.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Uniondale?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Uniondale typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, and cleanup. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before any work begins.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Uniondale home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in your attic or walls (especially at dawn and dusk), visible entry holes near roof lines or soffits, droppings in attic spaces, chewed wiring or insulation, and seeing squirrels entering or exiting your roof. If you notice any of these signs, contact us for an inspection.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal methods humane in Uniondale?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, ethical trapping and exclusion methods that comply with New York State wildlife regulations. Our approach focuses on safely capturing and relocating squirrels, then sealing entry points to prevent re-entry. We never use harmful poisons or inhumane practices.

faqs.question: How long does squirrel removal take in Uniondale?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Uniondale take 3-7 days from initial trapping to complete exclusion, though timelines vary based on the number of squirrels and complexity of entry points. We'll provide a specific timeline after your inspection. Emergency same-day service is available for urgent situations.
